title: cocculus orbiculatus
intro: Cocculus orbiculatus, also known as the sea berry or moonseed, is a climbing plant native to tropical Asia and Australia, characterized by its distinctive oval-shaped fruits and twining stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cocculus orbiculatus include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Cocculus orbiculatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
